title: Campaign Monitor vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Campaign Monitor vs Moosend: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs Moosend: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Campaign Monitor and Moosend comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Campaign Monitor is built for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Moosend targets small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_a: Agencies And Teams Managing Multiple Brands
comparison_table.tool_b: Small Businesses Wanting Unlimited Emails At Low Cost

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on agencies and teams managing multiple brands
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than Moosend?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Campaign Monitor wins for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Moosend is stronger for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend starts at a lower price point ($9/mo vs $11/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Moosend to Campaign Monitor is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
